questions.question_text: Write a comprehensive note on the history of Baloch Raj.
Write a comprehensive note on the life and works of Mubarak Qazi.
Write about the love story of Hani and Sheh Mureed, or Shahdad and Mahnaz.
Write an essay on the significance of Balochi classical poetry (Lok Shairi).
Discuss the thirty-year war between Rind and Lashar in the context of Baloch history and its repercussions.
Write a comprehensive note on the value of the native language.
Translate the given Balochi paragraph into English.
Translate the given English paragraph into Balochi.
